sentence_window:
(4) The issuer shall ensure that the consideration of specified securities, if paid in cash, shall be
received from respective allottee's bank account and in the case of joint holders, shall be received
from the bank account of the person whose name appears first in the application. 67

--- PAGE 68 --- (5) The issuer shall submit a certificate from the statutory auditors to the stock exchanges where
the equity shares of the issuer are listed stating that the issuer is in compliance of sub-regulation (4) and the relevant documents thereof are maintained by the issuer as on the date of certification. Allotment
170.
